phase_name: Topic cache — train Nami's technical knowledge into local weights
best_bpb_note: phase-0 v3, 16KB corpus. Apples-to-oranges with phase 5's 76KB corpus.
best_bpb_phase5_note: HYP4. Now confirmed unreproducible at current realistic system load (~135s/ep vs HYP4's 92s/ep). Treat 0.168 ± 5% as the realistic baseline.

last_result.hypothesis: HYP14: expand dialogues.py from 19 → 28 (9 non-colliding adds + 2 SwiGLU reinforcement). Goal: keep 30/31 + push topic recall 15→16 by fixing SwiGLU miss.
last_result.verdict: REVERT — corpus growth at fixed budget regressed across the board
last_result.reason: Reached ep 30 at 3679s (just over budget). bpb 0.1750 vs HYP13 0.1740 = +0.6% (within noise). But eval regressed everywhere: persona 4/5 (was 5/5, Ryan是誰? noised), extended 9/10 (was 10/10, -1), topic 14/16 (was 15/16, AutoMLIR newly missed bleeds 'numpy-grad' from chained autochat dialogue — same Kaspa-bleed pattern). Overall 27/31 vs HYP13 30/31, -3 hits. The SwiGLU reinforcement dialogues didn't fix the original SwiGLU miss either (still spits noise). Lesson: at this corpus / budget regime, more dialogue chains → more cross-topic bleed → exact-prefix probes break. HYP13's 7-dialogue config is the local sweet spot. Reverted dialogues.py via git checkout, corpus regenerated to 1190 (was 1199 with HYP14).

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-0 v2 Q&A long answers d=128
phase-0 v3 Q&A capped 40 chars d=96
phase-5 HYP2 +27 variants for 7 garbled topics 30min
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 9/16 but TRADED (different topics work); compute-bound at 30 min

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP3 +27 variants 45min budget
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 13/16 (9 verbatim + 4 partial) — best cache yet; bpb -21% vs HYP1

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP4 skip auto-memory MEMORY.md + 3 short-form variants
tried_hypotheses.note: topic recall 14/16, AutoMLIR leak fixed, persona recovered

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP5 +4 HYP11 + 4 Aqua starter variants 45min
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — diagnosis WAS 'corpus growth at compute frontier'; ACTUAL cause discovered post-HYP6: orphan bun 92506 stealing 1 CPU core slowed all runs ~50% since Apr 29 23:21

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP6 re-baseline (no code/data change)
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — also CPU-throttled; thought 92506 orphan was root cause; HYP7 disproved that

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP7 post-orphan-kill re-baseline
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — orphan only saved 14%; real issue is realistic system load; loss trajectory matches HYP4 but budget cuts at ep 21 not ep 30

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP8 TIME_BUDGET 45→60 min
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — baseline restored at realistic load. ep 30 reached, persona 5/5 incl ClawX, bpb within 5% noise of HYP4's quiet-system best

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP9 tied embedding
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — 25% faster epochs (param -33%) but bpb +18%, persona -20%. Same lesson as autochat HYP3: embedding can't serve dual roles at d_model 96 / 28K tokens

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP10 AdamW β2 0.95
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — bpb +124% catastrophic. β2=0.95 (GPT-3 recipe) too jumpy on our 300-token-per-batch regime; needs 0.999 default for small noisy batches

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-5 HYP11 HYP8 re-run for baseline weights
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — restored model_weights.json after HYP10 trashed it. eval.py: 5/5 + 10/10 + 13/16 = 28/31 (90.3% any-hit). Exact HYP8 reproduction (seed 42 deterministic)

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP12 self-distill v1 (override on collision)
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — but qualitatively: model produces multi-turn chains now ('Kaspa是什麼? → 基於... 用什麼共識？ GhostDag...'). Override path hurt 12 single-turn prefix matches. HYP13 will skip-instead-of-override.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP13 self-distill v2 (skip-on-collision)
tried_hypotheses.note: KEEP — eval 30/31 (vs HYP11 28/31, +2 topic recall). Phase 6 step 4 working: 7 non-colliding dialogues helped embedding without disturbing single-turn baseline. New best topic recall: 15/16.

tried_hypotheses.name: phase-6 HYP14 expand dialogues 19→28
tried_hypotheses.note: REVERT — eval 27/31 (-3 vs HYP13). 9 added dialogues caused cross-topic bleed (AutoMLIR newly broken). HYP13's 7 is sweet spot at this scale.
